task: Prevent deleted same-question safety coach retries from surfacing timeout-only errors

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real verification before reporting done, and code or UI changes require completion evidence.
Code, deploy, UI, and customer-facing answer changes require real entrypoint verification and completion evidence guard.

changes: Raised the safety coach request timeout to 30 seconds instead of the generic 16-second VP API timeout.
Kept a local backup when a completed coach answer is deleted.
If the same deleted question is retried and the browser request still times out, restored the deleted answer locally and synced it back to the stage draft instead of leaving only a timeout error.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-fB2YxEAa.js

residual_risk: There is no frontend unit test harness for TrainingScreen yet; behavior was verified through TypeScript build, ESLint, and production bundle checks after deployment.
